message:
test(fcp-core): update golden test vectors for enrollment and simulate

Regenerate CBOR test vectors to reflect current schema state:
- enrollment/request_vectors.cbor: Updated enrollment request golden data
- simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor: Updated simulation request golden data

These vectors are used for conformance testing to ensure serialization
compatibility across versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
